title: hieracium murorum subsp. dalecarlicum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. dalecarlicum, also known as Hieracium dalecarlicum, is a subspecies of the Hawkweed plant, a member of the dandelion family and native to northern Europe. The medicinal properties of Hieracium murorum subsp. dalecarlicum include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it useful for wound healing and skin conditions. This plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and boosting the immune system. Traditionally, Hieracium murorum subsp. dalecarlicum is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is used in herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
